forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
No Rating

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Possible small hail near the eastern border in the evening. Winds northwesterly and light increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, with possible small hail south of Keith in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
No Rating

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Possible small hail in the evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, with possible small hail in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending southwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border in the late morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending west to southwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost in the east. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Light winds becoming westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Ceduna in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly 25 to 35 km/h during the day then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 23.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
